sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Borussia M'gladbach are in poor form, winless in their last 6 matches with high-scoring games (4/5 over 2.5 goals) and no clean sheets. VfL Wolfsburg are also struggling, winless in their last 9 matches, conceding regularly (no clean sheet in 13 games). Both teams show defensive vulnerabilities.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, results are split with Wolfsburg winning 5-1 at home recently, while M'gladbach won 3-1 away last season. Matches between these teams often feature over 2.5 goals (6/8) and high corner counts (6/7 over 10.5).

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: M'gladbach (10th, 45 points) and Wolfsburg (12th, 40 points) have similar goal tallies (55 each), but both struggle defensively, with M'gladbach conceding 56 and Wolfsburg 54. M'gladbach's home advantage and slightly better league position give them a marginal edge.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: M'gladbach's Franck Honorat is in form (2 goals, 3 assists in last 5 matches), while Wolfsburg rely on Mohamed Amoura (10 goals). Both teams are likely to exploit defensive weaknesses, leading to an open game.
